message: ci: disable uv cache to avoid missing cache path error

files.patch:
@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
         with:
           python-version: "3.13"
-          enable-cache: true
+          enable-cache: false
           version: ${{ env.UV_VERSION }}
 
       - name: Verify tag matches VERSION file
